top.title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
top.summary: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

top.title: Israelis war-weary but most oppose Iran ceasefire, poll suggests
top.summary: The vast majority did not believe Hezbollah or Iran had been severely weakened by weeks of Israeli and US attacks, according to the poll.

top.title: Italian PM condemns ally Trump over 'unacceptable' Pope criticism
top.summary: Italy's prime minister and the US president are close allies, but Trump has refused to apologise to the "very weak" Pope Leo XIV.

top.title: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
top.summary: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.

top.title: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
top.summary: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.

top.title: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
top.summary: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California

title.#text: The Apple Watch Series 11 has returned to best-ever price
Xbox Game Pass ‘has become too expensive,’ says Microsoft’s new gaming chief in leaked memo
You can make a multicolor MacBook Neo out of Apple’s spare parts
